description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Manaus, Amazonas, founded in 2007 by Fernandes Barbosa, Zé Roberto da Compensa, and Gelson Carnaúba. It is the third-largest faction in Brazil and the largest in Amazonas, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and murder. The group has engaged in conflicts with other Brazilian factions, notably the Comando Vermelho and Primeiro Comando da Capital, and has declined in recent years due to internal disputes and defections.

country_links.evidence_quote: occupies northern Brazil and some regions in other countries such as: Colombia , Peru and Venezuela
country_links.context: The organization occupies regions in Colombia.
